must_do.full_text:
deepseek v4 is now the cheapest sota model available at 1/20th the cost of opus 4.7.

for perspective, if uber used deepseek instead of claude their 2026 ai budget would have lasted 7 years instead of only 4 months. https://t.co/i9rJZzvRBV

must_do.full_text:
Auto-review is a new mode that lets Codex work longer with fewer approvals and safer execution.

It helps Codex keep moving through tests, builds, and more, including during long tasks and automations, while a separate agent checks higher-risk steps in context before they run. https://t.co/TCcNC5yB0H
must_do.summary: OpenAI发布Codex新功能Auto-review模式，支持更长时间运行、更少审批、更安全执行，适用于测试、构建等长任务自动化场景。

priority.full_text:

This is a URDF of a 7dof robot arm with functional kinematics, a custom gui, and STEP parts/assembly, 100% generated in Codex (minus the gripper).
